meaning: n.间歇河(指冬季多雨时节才有水流而夏季干涸的河)
examples: You have probably never heard of Amy Winterbourne.
He stopped in the middle of the room and stood staring at Winterbourne.
You will find I am not so stiff as several others, "said Winterbourne, smiling."
The defendants were detained after secret filming by BBC Panorama at Winterbourne View, near Bristol.
The Winterbourne Care Centre in Salisbury is changing its name after receiving "a lot of hate mail".
